import"./MyRecipe.css";import{useEffect,useState}from"react";import axios from"axios";import{useNavigate,Link}from"react-router-dom";import UserNavbar from"./UserNavbar";import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs,Fragment as _Fragment}from"react/jsx-runtime";export default function MyRecipe(){const[recipes,setRecipes]=useState([]);const navigate=useNavigate();useEffect(()=>{const token=localStorage.getItem("token");const userId=localStorage.getItem("user_id");if(!token||!userId){alert("Please login first ❌");navigate("/login");return;}axios.get("http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/recipes/",{headers:{Authorization:`Token ${token}`}}).then(res=>{const myRecipes=res.data.filter(recipe=>String(recipe.created_by)===String(userId)).map(recipe=>{var _recipe$view_count;return{...recipe,image:recipe.image?`http://127.0.0.1:8000${recipe.image}`:"/default-food.jpg",author:"You",views:(_recipe$view_count=recipe.view_count)!==null&&_recipe$view_count!==void 0?_recipe$view_count:0};});setRecipes(myRecipes);}).catch(err=>{console.error("MyRecipe fetch error:",err);alert("Failed to load recipes ❌");});},[navigate]);// ================= DELETE =================
const handleDelete=id=>{const token=localStorage.getItem("token");if(!window.confirm("Are you sure you want to delete this recipe?"))return;axios.delete(`http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/recipes/delete/${id}/`,{headers:{Authorization:`Token ${token}`}}).then(()=>{setRecipes(recipes.filter(recipe=>recipe.id!==id));}).catch(err=>{console.error("Delete error:",err);alert("Delete failed ❌");});};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(_Fragment,{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(UserNavbar,{}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"recipes-page",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{children:"My Recipes"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"recipes-grid",children:[recipes.length===0&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{children:"No recipes found."}),recipes.map(recipe=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"recipe-card",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("img",{src:recipe.image,alt:recipe.title}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"recipe-info",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h3",{children:recipe.title}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("p",{children:["\uD83D\uDC64 ",recipe.author]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("p",{children:["\uD83D\uDC41 ",recipe.views," views"]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Link,{to:`/recipedetails/${recipe.id}`,className:"view-btn",children:"View Recipe"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"recipe-actions",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{className:"edit-btn",onClick:()=>navigate(`/editrecipe/${recipe.id}`),children:"Edit"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{className:"delete-btn",onClick:()=>handleDelete(recipe.id),children:"Delete"})]})]})]},recipe.id))]})]})]});}
